# Contribution packet

> Public intake is closed until the license and owner gates in
> `CONTRIBUTING.md` are resolved.

## Scope

- Contribution lane:
- Stable IDs changed:
- One bounded question or tool:

## Evidence and epistemics

- [ ] Every factual statement has a public source, revision, and exact locator.
- [ ] Observed fact, inference, hypothesis, and unknown are separated.
- [ ] Every claim states what the evidence does not prove.
- [ ] Counterevidence and plausible benign explanations are preserved.
- [ ] Dynamic load-bearing sources were reverified.

## Rights, privacy, and origin

- [ ] No client, patient, privileged, confidential, personal, paywalled, sealed, employer-restricted, private-repo, or raw-conversation material is included.
- [ ] Third-party content is pointer/hash/locator-only unless redistribution rights are documented.
- [ ] AI assistance is disclosed below and a human verified every source and line.
- [ ] Every commit is signed off under DCO 1.1 after that policy is activated.

AI assistance and provenance notes:

## Validation

- [ ] `python scripts/build_lineage.py --check`
- [ ] `python scripts/validate_research_radar.py`
- [ ] `python scripts/validate_navigation.py`
- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`
- [ ] Independent reviewer is not the sole author of the changed claim.
